products.name: deploy-arch-ibm-event-notifications
products.label: Cloud automation for Event Notifications
products.short_description: Creates and configures an IBM Cloud Event Notifications instance.
products.long_description: This architecture supports creating and configuring an IBM Cloud Event Notifications instance.

features.title: Creates an IBM Cloud Event Notifications instance
features.description: Creates an IBM Cloud Event Notifications instance.

features.title: Creates Key Rings and Keys
features.description: Creates Key Rings and Keys in an existing KMS instance used to encrypt data.

features.title: Collect events that fail delivery
features.description: Connect an existing IBM Cloud Object Storage service instance and bucket to collect events that fail delivery. Alternatively, create instances to connect to an Event Notifications instance.

products.support_details: This product is in the community registry, as such support is handled through the originated repo. If you experience issues please open an issue in that repository [https://github.com/terraform-ibm-modules/terraform-ibm-event-notifications/issues](https://github.com/terraform-ibm-modules/terraform-ibm-event-notifications/issues). Please note this product is not supported via the IBM Cloud Support Center.

profiles.profile_name: IBM Cloud Framework for Financial Services

architecture.descriptions: This architecture supports creating and configuring an IBM Cloud Event Notifications instance.

features.title: Creates an Event Notifications instance
features.description: Creates and configures an Event Notifications instance.

features.title: Creates key rings and keys
features.description: Creates key rings and keys in an existing KMS instance.

features.title: Collects events that fail delivery
features.description: Connect an existing Object Storage service instance and bucket. Alternatively, create instances to connect to an Event Notifications instance and collect events that faile delivery.

diagrams.description: This architecture supports creating and configuring an IBM Cloud Event Notifications instance.

profiles.profile_name: IBM Cloud Framework for Financial Services

configuration.description: Prefix to add to all resources created by this solution. To not use any prefix value, you can enter the string `__NULL__`.
Name of the Event Notification instance to create if not using an existing instance.
A list of access tags to apply to the resources created by this solution. For more information, see https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/account?topic=account-access-tags-tutorial.
CRN of existing Event Notifications instance, set if using an existing Event Notifications instance

configuration.displayname: Key Management Service encryption enabled
configuration.description: Set to true to enable encryption on Event Notifications instance and Cloud Object Storage bucket.

configuration.displayname: Existing Key Management Service instance CRN
configuration.description: CRN of existing Key Management Service instance. Required if setting 'key_management_service_encryption_enabled' to 'true'.

configuration.displayname: Key Management Service endpoint url
configuration.description: Endpoint URL of existing Key Management Service instance. Required if setting 'key_management_service_encryption_enabled' to 'true'.

configuration.displayname: Existing Key Management Service root key CRN
configuration.description: CRN of existing root key to be used in existing Key Management Service instance. To use 'key_management_service_encryption_enabled' must be enabled.

configuration.displayname: Exsiting Key Management Service key name
configuration.description: Name of existing root key to be used in existing Key Management Service instance. To use 'existing_key_management_service_root_key_crn' must be set.

configuration.displayname: Key Management Service endpoint type
configuration.description: The type of the endpoint that is used for communicating with the KMS instance. Possible values: `public` or `private` (default). Only used if not supplying an existing root key.

configuration.displayname: Cloud Object Storage key ring name
Cloud Object Storage key name
Skip Event Notifications Key Management Service auth policy
IBM Cloud Key Management Service apikey
Cloud Object Storage integration enabled
configuration.description: Set to 'true' to enable Cloud Object Storage integration with the Event Notification instance.

configuration.displayname: Existing Cloud Object Storage instance CRN
configuration.description: Existing Cloud Object Storage instance CRN. Required if 'cloud_object_storage_integration_enabled' is set to 'true'.

configuration.displayname: Existing Cloud Object Storage bucket name
configuration.description: Existing bucket in an existing Cloud Object Storage instance.

configuration.displayname: Existing Cloud Object Storage endpoint
configuration.description: The endpoint URL for your bucket region. [Learn more](https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/cloud-object-storage?topic=cloud-object-storage-endpoints). Only required if using an existing bucket with the `existing_cloud_object_storage_bucket_name` variable.

configuration.displayname: Cloud Object Storage bucket name
configuration.description: Name of Cloud Object Storage bucket to be created.

configuration.displayname: Key Management Service encryption enabled bucket
configuration.description: Set to true to enable Key Protect encryption on Cloud Object Storage bucket.

configuration.displayname: Cloud Object Storage bucket class
configuration.description: The storage class of the newly provisioned Cloud Object Storage bucket. Specify one of the following values for the storage class: `standard` (default), `vault`, `cold`, `smart`, or `onerate_active`.

configuration.displayname: Skip Event Notifications Cloud Object Storage auth policy
Skip Cloud Object Storage Key Management Service auth policy
Cloud Object Storage region
